title: Add comment to a column and to a group
excerpt: I would like to be able to say something to my team about a particular group and about a particular column (for example, how we’re using it). I can’t see how to do this. It seems that comments are for items only.  Might …

posts.author: jane.martel (Jane Martel)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to say something to my team about a particular group and about a particular column (for example, how we’re using it). I can’t see how to do this. It seems that comments are for items only. Might this be an enhancement feature in the future?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jane.martel

You might want to take a look at column descriptions. You can add/change them in the … menu in the column header:

image815×498 38.1 KB

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: jane.martel (Jane Martel)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! Yes, I was thinking that could work, if team members will look at it.
